Description: As a backend developer I want to replace HederaService with SawtakCosmosService so complaint submissions work with our Cosmos SDK blockchain
As an indexer operator I want to replace HederaIndexerService with CosmosIndexerService so complaint data is indexed from our Cosmos blockchain
As a database admin I want to update the Prisma schema so indexedComplaint supports cosmos_hash fields
As a backend developer I want to update dependency injection so Cosmos services replace Hedera services
As an API consumer I want updated endpoint documentation so I understand Cosmos-based responses
As a QA engineer I want updated tests for Cosmos so I can verify the migration works
As a DevOps engineer I want to remove Hedera dependencies so the codebase is clean and only supports Cosmos
